arabic:
وعنه قال‏:‏ سمعت رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم  يقول‏:‏ ‏
"‏لا يصومن أحدكم يوم الجمعة إلا يومًا قبله أو بعده‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: I heard the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) as saying: "None of you should observe fast on Friday except that he should observe fast either one day before it or one day after it.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
